chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1643 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For Non-prosecution 23-11-2023.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Faisal Shams Shaikh holding brief for Mr. Alam She Bozdar Advocate for the petitioner, under instructions does not press instant petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
